title: iberis fontqueri
intro: Iberis fontqueri, also known as Font Quer's candytuft, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula, characterized by its delicate white flowers and compact growth habit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are beneficial for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Iberis fontqueri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and digestive problems, while also promoting relaxation and reducing stress.
